focus: Classify all 28 manual-testing-playbook scenarios for typed-gold eligibility and provide a complete auditable partition.
noveltyJustification: 4 of 4 findings were fully new, including the objective rule and complete 23-eligible/5-non-routing partition.
keyQuestions: Which of the 28 playbook scenarios are genuine routing decisions eligible for typed gold?
Which scenarios are non-routing behavior coverage, and why?
answeredQuestions: Which of the 28 playbook scenarios are genuine routing decisions eligible for typed gold?
ruledOut: Treating every packet-local scenario as typed-gold eligible
Inventing exact prompts for procedural-only scenarios 022, 023, and 024
Treating automatic plugin and hook events as positive user routing decisions

summary: Typed gold requires an exact positive in-domain prompt that uniquely selects one resolvable scenario leaf; automatic events and procedural-only files are not eligible in current form.
23 scenarios are eligible for target-state typed gold under workflowMode system-code-graph.
Five scenarios should not carry typed gold in current form: three lack exact prompts and two are automatic integration triggers.
Current broad prefix expansion cannot express exact typed leaf selection for the eligible corpus; an enumerated leaf map and committed scenario frontmatter are prerequisites.
